name: Gabi Tasting V1
tagline: Wine tasting management app for a professional wine critic
description: The first version of a wine tasting management platform built for a professional wine critic. Allows organizing producers, wines, and tastings with structured sensory evaluation fields including aromas, acidity, tannins, body, and finish. Features email magic-link authentication, data tables with filtering, and CSV data import for bulk wine loading.
highlights: Structured wine tasting forms with sensory evaluation fields and scoring
Producer and wine catalog management with vintage tracking
Data tables with sorting and filtering via TanStack Table
CSV data import for bulk wine and tasting data loading
